subcodes.first_line: Thy petition hath attained unto the Most Great Horizon, and its summit hath been adorned with the crown of the remembrance of the Lord of all possibility. Be thou thankful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عریضه ات بمنظر اکبر فائز و راس آن باکلیل ذکر مالک امکان مزین شد ان اشکر و کن
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
